Please leave a detailed explanation of the logic I missed in Toy Story 2. Tell me if it requires the Easy or Hard skips modifier. Format your answers like so:

Easy=(Laser, Spin, OR Stomp) + (Pole Climb, Double Jump, OR Ledge Climb) OR  (Laser, Spin, OR Stomp) + Rocket Boots
